name: Stormline Company
specialty: Experienced in navigating the volatile rifts for loot and information, the Stormline Company has a reputation for returning with valuable artifacts and intelligence.

members.name: Mavric Stormforge
members.note: Scarred face, a constant reminder of battles won and lost

members.name: Seraphina Duskshadow
members.note: Always cloaked in black, her movements are as silent as the rifts themselves

members.name: Thorgrim Ironhide
members.note: Wears a suit of plate armor, his hammer never far from reach

members.name: Zephyr Glimmerstep
members.note: Quick-witted and charismatic, known for his silver-tongued persuasion

visual: Dressed in a mix of practical armor and leather, they move with a calculated grace, their faces etched with the hard lines of survival. A crimson banner bearing a lightning bolt emblazoned on their chest identifies them in the crowd.
reputation_note: Rumored to be former Tower Authority operatives, their intentions remain a mystery, but their success speaks for itself
